name: hours_cited
user_reply: The Jaipur Wax Museum is open Monday to Saturday from 10:00 AM to 6:30 PM, and on Sunday from 9:00 AM to 6:30 PM. (Source: Jaipur Wax Museum Nahargarh Fort - https://jaipurwaxmuseum.com/)

sources.title: Jaipur Wax Museum Nahargarh Fort
sources.snippet: Opening hours from Google Places card.
